notes: v0.16.34 — Phase 7/9: STRAFE RUN node. New MatchMode.STRAFE — side-scroll dodge node for rifts. Ship locked to a band on the left; hazards fly in from the right edge. 3 rotating hazards: WALL with a single gap (line yourself up to thread it), BULLET VOLLEY (3-6 staggered shots), and LASER row (telegraphs as a pulsing band, then fires a full-width beam — clear the row before it goes hot). WASD or arrows to dodge. 3 hits = node failed; survive 30s = node cleared. Difficulty scales cadence, hazard speed, gap width, bullet count, and laser dwell. Windows only.
